label: 2026-06-11 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-11 close
headlinePrimary: UST rally 回到 中段，但 30Y 仍要供給確認
summaryPreview: UST rally resumed as 2Y fell 8bp to 4.05%, 10Y fell 10bp to 4.45%, and 30Y fell 8bp to 4.95%; the actionable expression is staged 5Y-10Y Duration.
Core CPI rose 0.2% m/m versus 0.3% 市場預期, while Brent fell 4.63% and WTI fell 4.37%, reducing inflation tail risk.
regimePreview: Rates: 10Y 4.45%，分批承接 5Y-10Y
Curve: 2s10s 40bp、10s30s 50bp，偏好中段 carry
headlinePrimaryEn: UST rally returns to the belly, but 30Y still needs supply confirmation
summaryPreviewEn: UST rally resumed as 2Y fell 8bp to 4.05%, 10Y fell 10bp to 4.45%, and 30Y fell 8bp to 4.95%; the actionable expression is staged 5Y-10Y Duration.
Core CPI rose 0.2% m/m versus 0.3% consensus, while Brent fell 4.63% and WTI fell 4.37%, reducing inflation tail risk.

label: 2026-06-10 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-10 close
headlinePrimary: 核心 CPI 利多 沒守住，長端仍被油價、供給與資本吸收壓住
summaryPreview: 核心 CPI 低於預期只降低立即升息壓力；10Y 收 4.55%、30Y 收 5.03%，收盤仍偏 failed relief。
油價、中東風險、30Y 標售前供給與全球超長端需求偏弱，使長端買盤未確認。
regimePreview: Rates: 10Y 4.55%，CPI relief 沒守到收盤
Curve: 2s10s 42bp，長端仍卡在 5% 區
headlinePrimaryEn: Core-CPI relief failed into the close; oil, supply, and capital absorption still capped the long end
summaryPreviewEn: The softer core CPI reduced immediate hike pressure, but 10Y closed at 4.55% and 30Y at 5.03%, leaving the move as failed relief rather than a clean rally.
Oil, geopolitical risk, Treasury supply, and weak global super-long demand kept long-end confirmation missing.
regimePreviewEn: Rates: 10Y 4.55%; CPI relief faded by the close
Curve: 2s10s 42bp; long end still near the 5% zone

label: 2026-06-09 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-09 close
headlinePrimary: CPI 前美債小幅修復，但 30Y 仍在 5% 區，升息風險尚未解除
summaryPreview: UST 小幅反彈但仍在高位：2Y 4.13%、10Y 4.53%、30Y 5.01%，日內 -2 至 -3 bp，周/月變動仍偏空。
CPI 前升息尾端保護未撤：May CPI 預期 headline +4.2% y/y、core +2.9% y/y，SOFR options 仍押至少一次升息風險。
regimePreview: Rates: CPI 前只做小幅承接，10Y 4.53% 不是確認加碼
Curve: 2s10s +40 bp，前端升息風險仍壓住曲線
headlinePrimaryEn: Pre-CPI UST relief, but 30Y is still near 5% and the hike tail remains alive
summaryPreviewEn: USTs rallied modestly but remain high: 2Y 4.13%, 10Y 4.53%, 30Y 5.01%, down 2-3 bp on the day but still higher over one week and one month.
The Fed tightening tail remains alive before CPI, with May headline CPI expected near 4.2% y/y and core near 2.9% y/y.
regimePreviewEn: Rates: Only staged pre-CPI buying; 10Y at 4.53% is not an add signal
Curve: 2s10s at +40 bp keeps front-end hike risk in the curve

label: 2026-06-08 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-08 close
headlinePrimary: 前端殖利率暫歇，但 30Y 仍貼近 5%，CPI 前利率風險尚未解除
summaryPreview: 6 月 8 日 UST 呈現「前端暫歇、長端續壓」：2Y 日降 2bp 至 4.15%，10Y 日升 1bp 至 4.56%，30Y 日升 2bp 至 5.03%，2s10s 轉陡至 41bp。
美股反彈集中在 AI 與半導體：SOX +5.6%、Nasdaq 100 +1.6%、S&P 500 +0.3%，但 Dow -0.2%、多數成分股仍弱，對 FI 只能算壓力緩和，不是全面風險解除。
regimePreview: Rates: 前端暫歇，長端仍壓在 5% 區
曲線: 2s10s 轉陡，但不是成長恐慌買盤
headlinePrimaryEn: Front-end yields paused, but the 30Y sector above 5% keeps CPI-week rates risk alive
summaryPreviewEn: The June 8 UST close was a front-end pause with long-end pressure: 2Y fell 2bp to 4.15%, 10Y rose 1bp to 4.56%, 30Y rose 2bp to 5.03%, and 2s10s steepened to 41bp.
The equity rebound was concentrated in AI and semis: SOX +5.6%, Nasdaq 100 +1.6%, S&P 500 +0.3%, while Dow fell 0.2% and breadth stayed weak.
regimePreviewEn: Curve: 2s10s steepens without a growth-scare bid

label: 2026-06-05 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-05 收盤
headlinePrimary: 強非農推升前端利率，熊平壓住長天期 ETF
summaryPreview: 非農 +172k 明顯高於約 +80k 共識，2Y 升至 4.17%、5Y 升至 4.29%，Fed 保留升息選項的定價重新壓回前端與中段。
10Y 收 4.55%、30Y 收 5.01%，2s10s 與 5s30s 同步壓平，顯示長端買盤仍受期限溢價與供給壓力約束。
regimePreview: Rates: 前端與中段先重估 Fed 路徑
曲線: 熊平集中在 2s10s 與 5s30s
headlinePrimaryEn: Strong payrolls lift front-end yields; bear flattening keeps long-duration ETFs under pressure
summaryPreviewEn: Payrolls +172k beat roughly +80k consensus, lifting the 2Y to 4.17% and the 5Y to 4.29% as the Fed hike-option risk moved back into the front end and belly.
The 10Y closed at 4.55% and the 30Y at 5.01%; 2s10s and 5s30s both flattened, showing long-end buying is still constrained by term premium and supply.
regimePreviewEn: Rates: Front end and belly reprice the Fed path
Curve: Bear flattening sits in 2s10s and 5s30s

label: 2026-06-04 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-04 close
headlinePrimary: Claims 與油價讓前端降溫，長端 premium 仍黏著
summaryPreview: UST 走出 前端 / 中段修復：2Y 4.05%、10Y 4.47%、30Y 4.97%，2s10s 小幅轉陡至 42bp，5s30s 至 79bp。
Jobless claims 升至 225k、高於 211k 預期，油價回落近 3%，使前端升息溢價降溫，但 Fed 官員仍保留雙向反應。
regimePreview: Rates: 2Y/5Y -3bp，前端壓力降溫
Curve: 2s10s 回到 42bp，rally 轉陡
headlinePrimaryEn: Claims and lower oil cool the front-end, but long-end premium stays sticky
summaryPreviewEn: USTs delivered front-end and belly relief: 2Y at 4.05%, 10Y at 4.47%, 30Y at 4.97%, with 2s10s mildly steeper at 42bp and 5s30s at 79bp.
Initial claims rose to 225k versus 211k expected and oil fell nearly 3%, cooling front-end hike premium while Fed officials kept two-way optionality alive.

label: 2026-06-03 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-03 close
headlinePrimary: 油價與就業把 Fed 尾端風險推回前台
summaryPreview: UST 曲線以 空頭轉平 收盤：2Y 4.08%、10Y 4.49%、30Y 4.99%，2s10s 維持 41bp，5s30s 收斂至 78bp。
ADP 就業 +122k、ISM Services 54.5 高於預期，把 Fed swaps 年底升息機率推到 85%，油價與美元同時拉高政策溢價。
regimePreview: Rates: 2Y/10Y 同升 3bp，Fed 政策選擇權 回來
Curve: 5s30s 收至 78bp，前端與 belly 承壓
headlinePrimaryEn: Oil and Employment Put Fed Tail Risk Back in Focus
summaryPreviewEn: The UST curve closed with bear flattening: 2Y 4.08%, 10Y 4.49%, 30Y 4.99%; 2s10s held at 41bp and 5s30s compressed to 78bp.
ADP employment at +122k and ISM Services at 54.5 above expectations pushed Fed swaps year-end hike probability to 85%, while oil and the dollar both lifted the policy premium.
regimePreviewEn: Curve: 5s30s tightened to 78bp; front end and belly pressured

label: 2026-06-02 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-02 close
headlinePrimary: 勞動韌性壓住降息交易，油價回落讓 UST 長端小幅修復
summaryPreview: UST 收盤轉為溫和 多頭轉平：2Y 持平 4.05%，10Y 降 1bp 至 4.46%，30Y 降 2bp 至 4.97%，2s10s 收斂至 41bp。
JOLTS 開缺 7.6mn，高於 6.8mn 預估且高於 3 月 6.9mn，勞動韌性壓住降息交易；但油價從高點回落、WTI 收 93.51 美元，使長端獲得部分支撐。
regimePreview: Rates: 2Y 不動，10Y/30Y 小幅修復
Curve: 2s10s 41bp，曲線 relief 有限
headlinePrimaryEn: Labor resilience caps rate-cut trades, while lower oil lets the UST long end recover modestly
summaryPreviewEn: USTs closed in a mild bull-flattening tone: 2Y was unchanged at 4.05%, 10Y fell 1bp to 4.46%, 30Y fell 2bp to 4.97%, and 2s10s tightened to 41bp.

JOLTS openings were 7.6mn, above the 6.8mn estimate and March's 6.9mn, with labor resilience capping rate-cut trades; however, oil retreated from the highs and WTI closed at $93.51, giving the long end some support.

label: 2026-06-01 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-01 close
headlinePrimary: 油價衝擊重啟前端政策溢價，曲線轉為 空頭轉平
summaryPreview: 美債 6/1 官方收盤呈現前端主導的 空頭轉平：2Y 收 4.05%、日升 7bp，10Y 收 4.47%、日升 2bp，30Y 收 4.99% 持平，2s10s 收斂至 42bp。
風險資產沒有全面崩壞：S&P 500 收 7,599.96、日升 0.26%，Nasdaq 收 27,086.81、日升 0.42%，AI 交易抵銷多數股票下跌，但這種窄幅領漲讓 rates selloff 更像通膨與成長組合的再定價。
regimePreview: Rates: 2Y +7bp，前端重新定價
Curve: 2s10s 壓回 42bp，空頭轉平
headlinePrimaryEn: Oil shock reopens front-end policy premium as the curve shifts into bear flattening
summaryPreviewEn: The official UST close on 6/1 showed a front-end-led bear flattening: 2Y closed at 4.05%, up 7bp on the day; 10Y closed at 4.47%, up 2bp; 30Y closed unchanged at 4.99%; and 2s10s tightened to 42bp.

Oil was the core driver of the day’s rates repricing: WTI at one point jumped 6.5% intraday to USD 93, while Iran talks and Hormuz risk pushed up the broad inflation premium, Fed hike optionality, and USD haven demand at the same time.

label: 2026-05-29 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-05-29 close
headlinePrimary: 油價回落帶來戰術性久期喘息，但長端期限溢價尚未解除
summaryPreview: 美債週五以 多頭轉平 色彩收盤：2Y 收在 3.98%、10Y 4.45%、30Y 4.99%，2s10s 擴至 47bp，短端一週回落 15bp 但長端仍被 term premium 限制。
油價的月線壓力先壓低通膨溢價，Brent 週五約 92 美元、五月跌幅超過 16%；但週一亞洲時段回到約 93 美元，代表 geopolitics 仍會限制 duration rally 的外推。
regimePreview: Rates: 2Y/5Y 下行，10Y 黏在 4.45%
Curve: 5s30s 轉陡至 86bp
headlinePrimaryEn: Oil's pullback brings tactical duration relief, but long-end term premium has not cleared
summaryPreviewEn: USTs closed Friday with a bull-flattening tone: 2Y finished at 3.98%, 10Y at 4.45%, and 30Y at 4.99%, with 2s10s widening to 47bp. The front end rallied 15bp on the week, but the long end remained capped by term premium.

Oil's monthly pressure first lowered inflation premia, with Brent around $92 on Friday and down more than 16% in May; but the move back to around $93 in Monday Asia trading means geopolitics will still limit extrapolation of the duration rally.

label: 2026-05-28 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-05-28 close
headlinePrimary: 能源尾端風險降溫推動中長端修復，但 Fed 與信用品質仍限制追多
summaryPreview: 5/28 美債以中長端帶動的 bull-flattening 收盤：2Y 3.99%、10Y 4.45%、30Y 4.98%，2s10s 收斂至 46bp。
S&P 500 與 Nasdaq 續創高，黃金也反彈，代表市場不是單純風險追逐，而是在降低油價衝擊同時保留政策保險。
regimePreview: Rates: 10Y 回到 4.45%，rally 由中長端領先
曲線: 2s10s 收至 46bp，belly demand 回來
headlinePrimaryEn: Cooling energy tail risk drives intermediate and long-end repair, but the Fed and credit quality still cap upside chasing
summaryPreviewEn: On 5/28, USTs closed in a bull-flattening move led by the intermediate and long end: 2Y 3.99%, 10Y 4.45%, 30Y 4.98%, with 2s10s narrowing to 46bp.
The S&P 500 and Nasdaq continued to make new highs while gold also rebounded, indicating the market was not simply chasing risk, but reducing oil-shock exposure while retaining policy insurance.
